sibling|P16|P17|brothers.summary: P16 Salis (Meesuvvara) and P17 Davud (Sundhura Bavana) are modeled as `sibling` with label `brothers` to preserve a targeted continuity claim without over-promoting certainty.

parent P16 Salis (Meesuvvara) -> P15 Yoosuf (Bavanaadheeththa) (CLM-0285, SRC-MRF-KINGS)
parent P15 Yoosuf (Bavanaadheeththa) -> P17 Davud (Sundhura Bavana) (CLM-0286, SRC-MRF-KINGS)
